description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a flat top and bottom surface. The top face features evenly spaced, parallel grooves running lengthwise, giving it a ribbed texture. The sides are smooth and vertical, with sharp, well-defined edges and corners. The block is uniformly dark in color, suggesting it is made from a dense, possibly basaltic or granite stone. Its substantial thickness and solid appearance indicate it is designed to serve as a robust barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible signs of weathering, markings, or engravings on its surfaces.
description: A large, dark rectangular stone block with parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. It appears heavy, durable, and designed as an urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, grooved top surface and the smooth, solid front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the grooves and the block's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the grooved top and smooth back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the deep grooves and solid side profile.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a protective barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and unworn
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
